li.label: poor promotion ceremony
li.description: I was given a new rank, but the ceremony was underwhelming. Barely anyone showed up.

li.label: promoted in ceremony
li.description: I was promoted in front of the colony. It was a decent ceremony.

li.label: grand promotion ceremony
li.description: I was promoted before the whole colony. It is an honor to bear this rank.

li.label: legendary promotion ceremony
li.description: The entire colony gathered to see me promoted. I will never forget this moment.

li.label: witnessed promotion ceremony
li.description: I watched one of our own be promoted to a new rank. It was a fine ceremony.
